heading: Return and payment by governmental em­ployer
label: 3126 Return and payment by governmental em­ployer
text: If the employer is a State or political subdivision thereof, or an agency or instrumentality of any one or more of the foregoing, the return of the amount deducted and withheld upon any wages under section 3101 and the amount of the tax imposed by section 3111 may be made by any officer or employee of such State or political subdivision or such agency or instrumentality, as the case may be, having control of the payment of such wages, or appropriately designated for that purpose.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3126 was renumbered .section 3128 of this title
